reason: RQ1: extends — difficulty-aware dynamic workflow generation selects multi-agent configurations per task, relevant to adaptive task dispatch in decision agent teams (WWW2026).

RQ1: extends — Orchestrated Distributed Intelligence reconceptualizes multi-agent AI as cohesive orchestrated networks with multi-loop feedback, a potential paradigm-level reframe of decision agent design.

RQ3: extends — evaluates plan adherence fidelity in agentic systems, directly relevant to whether decision agent can independently close the loop without long-term assistant context.
RQ1: extends — hierarchical agent trees decompose complex goals into subgoals with control flow, an alternative architectural pattern for multi-agent workers team task decomposition.
